meta.description: Fashion inspired by football. Heritage pieces honouring the golden generations of Iraqi football — designed to be worn every day.

hero.sub: Heritage pieces honouring the golden generations of Iraqi football. Cut for the street, rooted in the stands.

home.storyBody: Capitres began with a simple question — why should the shirts we grew up loving live only in photographs? We rebuild the memory of Iraqi football into garments you can wear today: honest cotton, considered cuts, details borrowed from the archive.
home.heritageBody: From the olive pitch of the Olympics to the streets of Baghdad — the Heritage Capsule revives the kits that made a nation believe.

newsletter.title: First to know. Never benched.
newsletter.body: Drops, restocks and stories from the archive — straight to your inbox.
newsletter.success: You're on the list. Welcome to the club.
newsletter.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
newsletter.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

product.reviewsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No reviews yet} one {# review} other {# reviews}}

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.shippingNote: Shipping and discounts calculated at checkout.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.payBody: You'll be redirected to Wayl — Iraq's unified payment gateway — to complete your order securely.
checkout.payMethods: ZainCash · FastPay · FIB · Nass Wallet · QiCard · Visa / Mastercard
checkout.secureNote: Payments are processed by Wayl. Card details never touch our servers.
checkout.confirmFailedBody: Your payment was cancelled or rejected. No money moved — you can try again below.
checkout.confirmBody: Order {ref} is in. A confirmation email is on its way to {email}.
checkout.confirmGiftCards: Gift cards are delivered by email within minutes of payment.

errors.invalidPhone: Enter a valid Iraqi phone number
errors.paymentInit: We couldn't start the payment. Please try again.

mock.title: Wayl — Test Gateway
mock.body: This is a local stand-in for the Wayl hosted checkout. In production this page is checkout.thewayl.com with wallets, cards and bank transfer.

giftCards.title: The Capitres Gift Card
giftCards.body: For the one who never stopped believing. Delivered by email, redeemable on everything, valid for 24 months.
giftCards.how1: Pick an amount and write your message.
giftCards.how2: We email the card to them the moment your payment clears.
giftCards.how3: They redeem it at checkout — on drops, heritage pieces, anything.
giftCards.termsNote: Digital delivery only. Not redeemable for cash.

blog.title: Stories from the terraces
blog.intro: Lookbooks, brand history and the football culture that raised us.

about.title: Born in the stands, made for the street
about.lede: Capitres is an Iraqi clothing brand that turns football memory into everyday garments.
about.body1: Some countries archive their history in museums. Ours lives in football shirts — in the olive green of Los Angeles '84, in Ammo Baba's touchline silhouette, in radios pressed to ears across Baghdad, Basra, Erbil and Sulaymaniyah.
about.body2: We started Capitres to give that memory a wardrobe. Each piece begins in the archive: photographs, match reports, the shirts themselves. Then we rebuild it — honest cotton, considered cuts, details that reward a second look. Nothing nostalgic for nostalgia's sake; everything made to be worn hard, today.
about.quoteAttribution: The only brief we ever write
about.value1Body: Every reference is researched — seasons, kits, moments. If it's on the garment, it happened.
about.value2Body: Heavyweight cottons, reinforced seams, prints that survive the wash and the mosh.
about.value3Body: Three languages, one badge. Football never asked where you're from — neither do we.
about.ctaBody: Start with the Heritage Capsule — the pieces that started it all.

contact.title: Talk to us
contact.body: Questions about an order, sizing, wholesale or press — we read everything.
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Received. We'll reply within 1–2 working days.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

policies.sizeGuideIntro: Measurements are garment measurements in centimetres, taken flat. Between sizes? Size up — our heritage fits are cut relaxed.
policies.fitNote: Model wears size L. Heritage tees are boxy through the chest with a dropped shoulder.
policies.shippingIntro: We ship across every governorate of Iraq, and worldwide on request.
policies.shippingDomesticBody: 2–5 working days by trusted courier. Flat rate {flat}; free on orders over {threshold}. Cash on delivery is not available — payments are handled securely by Wayl before dispatch.
policies.shippingIntlBody: DM us on Instagram or use the contact form and we'll quote the courier rate for your city.
policies.returnsBody: Wrong size? You have 7 days from delivery to exchange, unworn with tags attached. Heritage drops are limited — refunds are issued to your original payment method via Wayl if we can't exchange.
policies.privacyBody1: We collect only what an order needs: your name, contact details and delivery address. Payment details go directly to Wayl and never touch our servers.
policies.privacyBody2: We never sell your data. Newsletter emails go out only if you opted in, and every one carries an unsubscribe link.
policies.termsBody1: Prices are listed in Iraqi Dinar (IQD). Orders are confirmed once payment completes through Wayl and you receive an order reference.
policies.termsBody2: Heritage releases are limited editions; quantities per customer may be capped during drops. All imagery and designs are the property of Capitres.

notFound.title: Off the pitch
notFound.body: The page you're after has been transferred or never existed.

collectionsPage.title: Every drop is a chapter
collectionsPage.archivedBody: This collaboration has sold through. Join the list to hear about the next one first.
